title: Technoblade Pig Crown
description: Adds a 1-in-7 chance for vanilla pigs to spawn with a Technoblade-style crown. Requires ETF, ETM, or OptiFine. Works on 1.21.x and likely earlier versions.
body:
# Technoblade Crown Pigs

This resource pack adds a Technoblade-style crown to regular pigs.
With a 1-in-7 chance, some pigs will naturally spawn wearing the crown, making the world feel livelier and more unique.

# Features :

-   Technoblade crown variant for default pigs only
-   Random 1/7 chance for crowned pigs
-   Lightweight and fully visual
-   Works reliably on Minecraft 1.21.x
-   Likely compatible with earlier versions as well

# Requirements :

### This pack supports and requires at least one of the following:
-   ETF (Entity Texture Features)
-   ETM (Entity Texture Mod)
-   OptiFine (CEM / Random Entities)

# Notes :

Purely cosmetic — no gameplay changes.
Designed for vanilla pigs, not modded variants.
